backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend with data types and CRUD operations for memories, quotes, fun facts, and messages, plus a passcode verification function using 'Nobita' as the correct code.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three audio-fix features (Dreamy.mp3 on LockScreen, Hello.mp3 on ChatPage, Double Knock.mp3 global hook) to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries for all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and game in the Doraemon-themed React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Doraemon Secret World' that mounts the React app via a root div and loads the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main TanStack Router setup defining all app routes with authentication guards; the RootLayout component calls useDoubleKnockSound globally and renders StarBackground, FloatingMusicControl, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/FloatingMusicCon: Fixed bottom-right floating UI component with play/pause and expandable volume slider controls, integrated with the useBGM hook.
frontend/src/components/GlassPanel.tsx: Reusable glassmorphism card component supporting Doraemon-themed neon glow border colors, optional float animation, hover lift effect, and a style prop.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main application shell with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation bar, and logout functionality, rendering child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Fixed decorative background component that renders 80 randomly positioned twinkling stars and 8 floating bubbles using memoized arrays and CSS custom properties for animation timing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBGM.ts: Custom hook that manages background music playback via an HTML Audio element, exposing play/pause/toggle controls and volume adjustment.
frontend/src/hooks/useClickSound.ts: Custom hook that synthesizes a Doraemon-style two-note bell chime using the Web Audio API and plays it on every global click or touch event, throttled to 120ms.
frontend/src/hooks/useDoubleKnockSound.t: Custom hook that plays a 'Double Knock' audio file on every global click or touch event, throttled to 120ms to prevent rapid overlapping playback.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, and persisted identity state across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including memories, quotes, fun facts, messages, and auth code verification, each wired to the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines the Doraemon-themed design system including CSS custom properties for colors, glassmorphism utilities, neon glow effects, and Tailwind base/component/utility layers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Chat page where users can send messages and receive bot responses as 'Nobita', with typing indicators, quick replies, and message persistence via backend queries.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a hero section with Doraemon and a grid of navigation portals linking to all major app sections; seeds backend data on load.
frontend/src/pages/FriendshipPage.tsx: Page showcasing the Nobita and Doraemon friendship through animated, scroll-triggered quote panels with alternating slide-in effects.
frontend/src/pages/games/ExamQuizPage.ts: A 10-question Doraemon trivia quiz game where the player answers multiple-choice questions and tries to beat Nobita's score of zero. Tracks correct answers, displays results per question, and shows a final score summary with reset functionality.
frontend/src/pages/games/GadgetClickerPa: A 30-second clicker mini-game where emoji gadgets spawn at random positions and disappear if not clicked in time, tracking score and missed clicks. Manages spawn and countdown intervals with cleanup via refs.
frontend/src/pages/games/MazePage.tsx: A maze game page that generates a random maze using recursive backtracking and lets the player navigate with keyboard arrow/WASD keys, tracking moves and elapsed time until reaching the goal.
frontend/src/pages/games/MemoryMatchPage: A memory card matching game page with 12 emoji pairs, handling card flipping, match detection, move counting, and a win condition when all pairs are matched.
frontend/src/pages/games/SlidingPuzzlePa: A 3x3 sliding puzzle game page where tiles are shuffled and the player clicks adjacent tiles to move them into the solved order, tracking moves and elapsed time.
frontend/src/pages/games/WhackADoraemonP: A whack-a-mole style game page with a 9-hole grid, 30-second timer, combo scoring, and random character spawning at set intervals.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Games hub page listing six Doraemon-themed mini-games as clickable cards with descriptions, badges, and navigation to individual game routes.
frontend/src/pages/LockScreen.tsx: Password-protected lock screen that verifies a user-entered code via a backend mutation and redirects to the dashboard on success, with shake animation on failure.
frontend/src/pages/MemoriesPage.tsx: A page for viewing and adding personal memories, displaying them as animated glass cards with title, content, and date. Uses React Query hooks to fetch and mutate memory data from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/OurMemoriesPage.tsx: A photo gallery page showing a curated set of memory photos in a masonry grid layout with a lightbox modal on click. Navigates back to the dashboard and displays a fixed set of local image assets.
frontend/src/pages/QuotesPage.tsx: A page that displays a random Doraemon quote and a random fun fact, each refreshable via React Query invalidation with fade transition animations. Uses GlassPanel components and lucide icons for layout.
frontend/src/utils/botResponses.ts: A rule-based NLP chatbot engine that provides in-character responses as Nobita from Doraemon, with categorized response pools for topics like greetings, love, friendship, and memories.
frontend/src/utils/seedData.ts: Defines static sample data arrays (memories, quotes, fun facts) with a Doraemon theme, typed against the backendInterface, for use as placeholder/seed content in the frontend.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Orbitron, Space Grotesk, Nunito), a Doraemon-themed color palette using OKLCH values, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for a fix request targeting broken audio playback of three sound effects (Dreamy.mp3, Hello.mp3, Double Knock.mp3) across lock screen, chat, and global click/touch handlers, with a pending audit task to correct all public asset paths.
